title: Blob/lookup: JMAP method + types + test
description:
Why: The JMAP-BLOBEXT spec (urn:ietf:params:jmap:blob2) adds Blob/lookup for reverse lookup of blobIds to Message/FileNode references. Chat servers should support this for attachment management.

What: Add to crates/jmap-chat/src/methods/blob.rs (new file):
- BlobLookupEntry { id: String, matched_ids: HashMap<String, Vec<String>> }
- BlobLookupResponse { account_id: String, list: Vec<BlobLookupEntry>, not_found: Option<Vec<String>> }
- JmapChatClient::blob_lookup(session, blob_ids: &[&str], type_names: Option<&[&str]>) -> Result<BlobLookupResponse, ClientError>
  * using array: ['urn:ietf:params:jmap:core', 'urn:ietf:params:jmap:blob2']
  * Uses build_request pattern from methods/mod.rs
- Add pub mod blob; to methods/mod.rs
- Add fixture: tests/fixtures/methods/blob_lookup_response.json
- Test: wiremock POST /api returning fixture; assert list[0].matched_ids parsed correctly

Defensive rules: no unwrap(); #[non_exhaustive] on BlobLookupEntry and BlobLookupResponse (server-received types).
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; blob_lookup test verifies matched_ids deserialization
